choice_rule: Closed families and prior NEXT are context, not allowlists. Reopen only with a named new evidence class or repaired capability. Operational completion is separate from strategy advancement. Use discovery_bar for F0→F1/F1→F2 signals and capital_seat_bar for L1/paper seats; discovery survivors never earn L1 alone. A blocked observed-option route blocks only dependent claims and cannot alone justify stop while another historical route remains informative. After two consecutive epoch wakes without STRATEGY_ADVANCED, pivot mechanism/evidence class; after three, stop the burst and reassess search design/data. Prior-epoch DIMINISHING_RETURNS is superseded once configs/search_epoch.json marks reassessment_complete. Honest information-exhaustion stops remain valid after open routes are assessed for material novelty.
closed_families: BROAD_SECTOR_BREADTH_THRUST_FORWARD_DRIFT: same present-day SPY plus eleven-sector panel with nearby breadth 8-10/11, five-session thrust/control-band, 5-15-session horizon, SMA50/SMA100, or same novelty-class retunes without a materially new mechanism or control design

CROSS_SECTION_FIVE_SESSION_RESIDUAL_REVERSAL: same fixed 14-name present-day panel, bottom-three residual laggards versus neutral-three controls, nearby treated mean residual threshold around -4%, and nearby five-session feature/forward-horizon retunes; reopening requires a materially new mechanism or genuinely prior-known event labels frozen before outcomes
MONTHLY_OPEX_POST_EXPIRY_BROAD_INDEX_DRIFT: exact SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA first-Friday-control next-session five-session 60/40 10-bps three-month-block-bootstrap specification
MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1: exact frozen 14-DTE one-dollar-width listed-expiry proxy bull-call expression with dual adverse cost axes and one-global-unit management
ONE_RISK_UNIT_CADENCE_POLICY_F0: exact ONE_RISK_UNIT_CADENCE_PCS_V1 global-one-unit fixed-priority catalog-14-DTE PCS implementation across the frozen eight-symbol panel and dual cost axes

POST_EARNINGS_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_DRIFT: exact frozen AAPL/AMD/SMCI/TSLA/META/GOOGL/ARM/NVDA present-day panel, retrospective explicit BMO/AMC timestamps, >=2% first-completed-session reaction, prior same-symbol same-sign non-event controls, five-session signed continuation, chronological 60/40 specification

POST_SHOCK_RANGE_COMPRESSION_MATCHED_CONTROL: exact frozen AAPL/AMD/META/GOOGL/NVDA/AVGO panel, >=2% completed shock, hv20/hv60>=1.20, within 5% prior SMA20, prior-only same-symbol high-HV |1d|<=0.5% controls, next-session entry, five-session range and terminal +/-3% pin, chronological 60/40 specification

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: Exact SPY_INDEX_THETA_CARRY_PCS_21D_V1 / SPY_INDEX_THETA_CARRY_REGIME_GATED_21D on SPY: one-lot Black-Scholes/listed-Friday proxy 21-DTE put credit spread, 0.20-delta short put, $2 protective wing, minimum $0.30 credit on both adverse cost axes, expiration precedence, 50% profit target, 70% structural-loss exit, short-put delta 0.45 exit, 10-session stop, no roll or same-bar re-entry; capital_fit_usd=200 structural planning bound, max_loss_usd=200 width bound before credit/friction, observed modeled one-trade loss <=169.998609, max_lots=1.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Broad-index downside-insurance demand may create an equity-risk-premium and theta carry that a lag-safe non-bearish SPY trend/VIX regime can harvest while standing aside during bearish states.
recent_runs.next: TAIL_HAZARD_EPOCH_BURST_STOP_REASSESSMENT: stop strategy-experiment volume in active epoch 2026-07-15-tail-hazard-discovery after three no-advance wakes; write a dated search-design/data reassessment of the recent-downshock, downside-semivariance, and SPY theta-carry failures, inventory informative versus thrash-prone evidence classes, preserve both sealed holdouts, and decide whether to close the lane or reopen only under one named new evidence class. Default to no new strategy experiment in that wake; no SPY same-panel retune, F1/L1 laundering, registry, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, or live action.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: Exact TSLL_OBSERVED_TERM_CARRY_DIAGONAL_V1: buy one observed listed TSLL 60-90 DTE call with model-derived delta 0.60-0.75 and sell one higher-strike 14-21 DTE call with delta 0.20-0.35; require front/back extrinsic-per-day ratio >=1.25, each leg half-spread <=$0.10, same-snapshot observed marks, lag-safe bullish regime/event gates, one-position cadence, +25%/-25% package exits, five-session/short<=7 DTE/event/assignment exits, no roll or same-session re-entry; capital_fit_usd=$300 is a research admission budget, structural max_loss_usd is UNPROVEN, and max_lots=1.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: In lag-safe non-bearish TSLA/TSLL regimes, observed TSLL front-expiry call extrinsic may decay faster per day than a farther-dated call, allowing a one-lot bullish diagonal to harvest relative term-structure carry after executable two-leg costs.
recent_runs.next: TSLL_OBSERVED_TERM_CARRY_DATA_OR_INDEPENDENT_L0: if a new weekday-RTH date arrives and the frozen population floor is unmet, append one all-expiration TSLL snapshot and report density/path/admission/control counters only; off-hours while unmet, pursue a genuinely independent non-quarantined L0 mechanism without proxy-satisfying or mutating the parked diagonal; once 12 RTH dates, 3 cycles, 20 complete paths, and 8 frozen controls exist, evaluate the exact predeclared development falsifier while preserving the final 40% unread. Pure append reaffirmations set evidence_wait_reaffirmation=true and do not increment pivot/burst-stop streaks; no registry, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live action.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: Exact BROAD_SECTOR_BREADTH_THRUST_SPY_BULL_CALL_21D_V1 / BROAD_SECTOR_BREADTH_THRUST_FORWARD_DRIFT on SPY with fixed present-day XLB/XLC/XLE/XLF/XLI/XLK/XLP/XLRE/XLU/XLV/XLY breadth panel; future conditional one-lot 18-24 DTE $2-wide SPY bull-call debit spread only, capital_fit_usd=200, frictionless structural max_loss_usd=200 only when debit <=200, max_lots=1; zero option pricing and no capital seat.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Rapid expansion from narrow to broad sector participation inside an already positive SPY trend may reflect distributed institutional demand and slow position diffusion, creating incremental ten-session upside versus high-breadth but non-thrust same-regime controls.
recent_runs.next: TSLL_OBSERVED_TERM_CARRY_DATA_OR_MATERIALLY_DIFFERENT_L0_PIVOT: use exactly one branch per wake—distinct weekday-RTH and frozen 12-date/3-cycle/20-path/8-control floor unmet -> append one provenance-safe all-expiration TSLL snapshot and report counters only, EVIDENCE_WAIT reaffirmation streak-exempt; off-hours -> materially different non-quarantined mechanism/evidence class outside sector-breadth directional continuation and all integrated closed families; observed floor met -> evaluate exact parked diagonal development 60% and keep final 40% unread. No same-date churn, same-panel breadth retune, holdout salvage, registry/paper force, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live action.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: Exact CROSS_SECTION_RESIDUAL_REVERSAL_BULL_CALL_21D_V1 / CROSS_SECTION_FIVE_SESSION_RESIDUAL_REVERSAL on the fixed present-day AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, AMZN, META, GOOGL, AMD, NFLX, TSLA, AVGO, MU, JPM, XOM, BAC panel; bottom-three five-session residual laggards when their mean residual is <=-4% versus same-date neutral-three controls; future conditional one-lot 18-24 DTE $2-wide bull-call debit spread only, capital_fit_usd=200, future frictionless debit/max-loss ceiling=200 before unmodeled closing friction, max_lots=1; zero option pricing and no capital seat.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Temporary issuer-specific liquidity, attention, or positioning pressure may push liquid stocks materially below their same-date peer basket; if the move is overreaction rather than persistent information, the bottom residual laggards should rebound absolutely and outperform contemporaneous neutral-residual peers over the next five completed sessions.
recent_runs.next: SEARCH_DESIGN_REASSESS_AFTER_RESIDUAL_REVERSAL_TAIL_CLOSE: stop strategy-volume search; reconcile the three active-epoch no-advance outcomes, assess whether favorable centers with failed tails indicate a genuinely new prior-known event-risk evidence route or a broader data/design limitation, carry forward the parked observed-diagonal data floor without same-date churn, and start a successor epoch only after a dated reassessment names a non-quarantined mechanism or evidence class. Do not open the sealed 96-blueprint holdout, delete high-beta symbols post hoc, loosen the -5% tail gate, force registry/paper, or enter shadow/arm/broker/live paths.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: Exact MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 option expression, alias BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_055D_1W_10S_V1, on frozen AAPL/MSFT/NVDA/AMZN/META/GOOGL/AMD/TSLA development blueprints; historical underlying F2 is L0 context only, the option expression is closed, and there is no living F2 seat. One lot; capital_fit_usd=92.56501618263479; observed stressed one-lot max_loss_usd=246.90032488027197; max_lots=1.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Gradual information diffusion and trend-following demand may sustain ten-session upside after a lag-safe 20-session breakout, but the exact fixed 14-DTE one-dollar bull-call expression must retain that edge after dual adverse multi-leg costs and one-global-unit portfolio management.
recent_runs.next: FOMC_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_SPY_DIRECTION_F0: open one successor epoch around official prior-known FOMC decision dates; before outcomes freeze the official schedule/published-time session map, ambiguous-time stand-aside, next-completed-session entry, signed five-session SPY return with positive direction predeclared and no post-hoc short/two-sided flip, prior-only same-regime matched controls with no reuse/substitution, chronological train/sealed unread holdout, dependence-aware uncertainty/tail/density and control-support gates, and zero option pricing at F0. Keep it distinct from closed issuer post-earnings drift. Conditional future structure is one-lot 18-24 DTE $2 bull-call debit spread with capital_fit_usd=$200, frictionless max_loss_usd=$200 before closing friction, max_lots=1; no OPEX/TOM/breadth/residual/breakout retune, registry, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, or live action.

observed_historical_option_replay.blocked_reason: no broad historical observed option surfaces with complete entry/exit joins
observed_historical_option_replay.claim_limit: three dates validate capture/join plumbing or begin cost calibration; they do not establish strategy edge or L1

research_routes.rule: A blocked observed-option route blocks only observed-option claims. Archive density alone cannot justify DIMINISHING_RETURNS while another independent route remains informative; honest information-exhaustion stops remain valid.

search_epoch.epoch_success_definition: Advance the exact candidate from F0 to F1 only if every frozen train discovery gate passes with the sealed 40% holdout unread and zero option pricing; otherwise close the exact policy-information-resolution family without threshold, sign, regime, control, horizon, or option-structure retuning.

strategy_run_contract.rule: Every BUILD wake must declare economic_mechanism, candidate_or_family_scope, funnel_stage_before/after, falsifier, and exactly one strategy outcome. Capability/tooling alone is not strategy progress unless the unlocked experiment is exercised in-wake to STRATEGY_ADVANCED or FAMILY_CLOSED via BLOCKER_REMOVED_AND_RETESTED. STRATEGY_ADVANCED at F0→F1 may use discovery_bar when claim scope is labeled L0 discovery; capital path/L1 still requires capital_seat_bar.
